title: weigela × wagneri
intro: Weigela × wagneri, a hybrid deciduous shrub, is a cross between Weigela florida and Weigela praecox, commonly known as the Weigela or Trumpet Vine, renowned for its showy, trumpet-shaped flowers in shades of pink, red, and white. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia, where its leaves and roots are valued for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Weigela × wagneri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Weigela × wagneri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
